title: Richmond Regional Housing Framework
text:
About this update
This is the 2026 Data Update to the Richmond Regional Housing Framework, produced by HDAdvisors for the Partnership for Housing Affordability (PHA). It refreshes the 2022 Framework with the latest available data and reorganizes the findings around the region’s most pressing housing themes.
The update covers the PlanRVA region — Charles City, Chesterfield, Goochland, Hanover, Henrico, New Kent, and Powhatan counties; the City of Richmond; and the Town of Ashland. Regional analysis centers on the four primary jurisdictions (Chesterfield, Hanover, Henrico, and Richmond); the five secondary localities receive individual local summaries.
Five preliminary-findings sections anchor the update:

Housing demand
Homeownership market
Rental market
Housing gap
Cost burden and instability

Each section leads with what changed since the 2022 Framework and organizes its findings by takeaway rather than by data source.






Note



This is a preliminary draft for PHA review. Content is under active development and the site is not yet indexed for search. Reviewers can comment inline using Hypothesis.
